name: Reverse Wave
preceding_figure_names: Basic Weave, Bounce Fallaway with Weave Ending, Closed Impetus and Feather Finish, Fallaway Reverse and Slip Pivot, Feather Step, Hover Cross, Hover Feather, Natural Hover Telemark, Natural Telemark, Natural Twist Turn, Natural Weave, Natural Zig-Zag from PP, Open Telemark and Feather Ending, Open Telemark, Natural Turn, Outside Swivel and Feather Ending, Reverse Turn, Top Spin, Weave from PP
following_figure_names: Feather Step, Basic Weave (after step 4), Closed Impetus and Feather Finish (after step 6), Open Impetus (after step 6), Hover Feather (after step 8), Curved Feather to Back Feather (at corner)
notes: Extended Reverse Wave can be performed by adding SQQ after step 6: Man continues BLOD with TH LF back, Q RF back R shoulder leading, Q TH LF back in CBMP; Lady continues facing LOD, poise not back weight, shoulder dancing in back of the feet; then continue from step 4 again. Head can keep left or shape to R. The feeling is legs are dancing ahead of body.

steps.action: LF fwd, start to turn left, Sway(S), CBM, rise e/o 1
